title: Multi-Agent Systems
description: Orchestrating multiple agents that collaborate, delegate, and communicate

lessons.title: Why Multi-Agent Systems?
lessons.description: When one agent isn't enough: specialization, parallelism, and separation of concerns

lessons.title: Orchestration Patterns
lessons.description: Supervisor, swarm, pipeline, and hierarchical agent topologies

lessons.title: Agent Communication
lessons.description: Message passing, shared state, blackboard systems, and event-driven coordination

lessons.title: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol
lessons.description: Google's open standard for cross-platform agent interoperability

lessons.title: Task Decomposition and Delegation
lessons.description: Breaking complex tasks into subtasks and assigning them to specialized agents

lessons.title: Debate, Voting, and Consensus
lessons.description: Agents that argue, vote, and converge on better answers together

lessons.title: Multi-Agent Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: build a research team with a supervisor, researcher, and writer agent
